texto: A bad attitude from a chronic complaining employee is like a cancer
autor: it will only spread and infect others. This can take your business down in a nanosecond. You must cut out the cancer and invite them to seek employment elsewhere. Quickly.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a it will only spread and infect others. This can take your business down in a nanosecond. You must cut out the cancer and invite them to seek employment elsewhere. Quickly.: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “A bad attitude from a chronic complaining employee is like a cancer” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, beth-ramsay, attitude pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de reflexao.
